'''Kroke Modbom''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] who worked for the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] known as [[Veermok (Naboo)|Veermok]]. Kroke and Veermok opposed the [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Monarchy of Naboo]], and sought evidence of corruption within its ranks. In [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]], Kroke went to [[Port Landien]] in search of a cache of evidence, whereupon he was chased by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka]] and his partner [[Bialy]] of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Force]] through the [[Port Landien Perfumery]]. Kroke was arrested, and was later turned over to [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]], who claimed the Gungan was guilty of murder and treason against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. He was taken offworld and executed under Sate's orders.<ref name="The Monster" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Kroke's first name is sometimes misspelled "Korke".
